title: BridgeTrustEntry
description: One row in the bridge_trust Room table (REQ-010). Models TOFU pin state for a single bridge.

signing_pubkey_hex.description: Pinned Ed25519 signing pubkey (32 bytes, hex). Updated only via explicit user-accepted re-pin (REQ-009).

first_seen_at.description: Unix epoch seconds when this bridge_hash was first pinned. Immutable after insert.

last_seen_at.description: Unix epoch seconds of the most recent successful bundle import for this bridge. Updated on every EXISTING_TRUSTED match (REQ-015).

status.description: Current pin state. NEW_TRUSTED on first import; EXISTING_TRUSTED on subsequent matching imports; REPINNED_AFTER_MISMATCH if the user accepted a re-pin after a KeyMismatch.
